sql_array: CREATE TABLE trace_example (instruction_address UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT addressToLine(instruction_address) AS source_info FROM trace_example;
UPDATE trace_example SET instruction_address = 94784076370704 WHERE instruction_address = 94784076370703;
SELECT arrayStringConcat(arrayMap(addr -> addressToLine(addr), arrayJoin([94784076370703, 94784076370704])), '\n') AS trace_source_code_lines FROM trace_example;
